data.biography:
Nodt Nutthasid Panyangarm is an actor managed by Be On Cloud.

Nodt graduated from Kasetsart University Kamphaeng San Campus, Faculty of Liberal Arts and Science Program Marketing. He has a handmade paracord accessory store called Knoth Handcrafted.
data.name: Nutthasid Panyangarm
ณัฐสิทธิ์ ปัญญางาม
